Title: LLM Internals & Model Selection

Title: Prompt Engineering Deep Dive
Key Patterns / Concepts: System prompt anatomy, few-shot, Chain-of-Thought, XML structuring, extended thinking (budget_tokens)

Title: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
Key Patterns / Concepts: JSON-RPC over stdio, tools/list, tools/call, MCP resources, protocol-based tool sharing

Title: A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol)

Notes: NEW. Completes the 2026 protocol stack: MCP = agent↔tool
column12: A2A = agent↔agent. Only gap vs Master Scalable Agentic AI infographic.

Notes: Gap vs Master Scalable Agentic AI infographic (concept 2). Bridges protocol sessions to agent-loop internals — teaches engineers to deliberately assemble what the model sees on every call.

Title: Browser Automation & Computer Use
Key Patterns / Concepts: Anthropic Computer Use API, screenshot-driven action loop, DOM-free web interaction, form fill + navigation without Playwright, goal-conditioned web task chain, no-human-in-the-loop browser workflow
Notes: Maps to image item 06 (Automate the Browser End-to-End). Claude drives a real browser from a natural-language goal — search, click, fill, extract — autonomously.

Title: Scheduled Cloud Routines
Key Patterns / Concepts: Cron-driven Claude Code workflows (/schedule skill + cron API), prompt-plus-schedule pattern, idempotent task design, result persistence, wake-up-to-result pipeline, overnight automation without a human trigger
Notes: Maps to image item 08 (Schedule Cloud Routines Overnight). Automate recurring research, reports, or alerts entirely via scheduled prompts — no manual trigger needed.

Title: Document & Slide Generation
Key Patterns / Concepts: JD-to-resume rewrite (ATS optimisation), structured slide outline → rendered deck, PDF export via WeasyPrint/pptx, context-aware template injection, multi-format output from a single prompt
Notes: Maps to image items 07 (Tailor Docs/Resumes) and 09 (Design Pages/Decks Without Figma). Claude as a context-aware document factory — paste input, describe format, receive publish-ready output.

Title: Multi-Agent Code Review Pipeline
Key Patterns / Concepts: Parallel specialist reviewer agents (security / logic / style / docs), severity classification schema (critical→low), structured finding schema, finding dedup + merge, GitHub PR annotation via API, scale reviews without headcount
Notes: Maps to image item 10 (Run Multi-Agent Code Reviews in Parallel). Drop a PR URL; four agents fan out in parallel and label every finding critical/major/minor/low. Mirrors the Claude Code /code-review skill architecture.

Title: Claude Code Project Structure (Full Tutorial)
Key Patterns / Concepts: CLAUDE.md (loaded every session), CLAUDE.local.md (personal overrides gitignored), AGENTS.md (subagent roster), mcp.json (MCP integrations), settings.json (permissions + hooks), rules/*.md (modular on-demand rules), commands/*.md (custom slash commands), skills/<name>/SKILL.md (context-triggered knowledge), agents/*.md (specialist subagents with own system prompts), hooks/*.sh (event-driven enforcement), memory/*.md (persistent cross-session context), workflows/*.md (multi-step task blueprints)
Notes: NEW. Tutorial covering the full Claude Code project structure shown in the Claude Code Project Structure infographic. Each layer is explained, built, and exercised with hands-on tasks. Capstone of Track M — ties together every session in the track.
